name: Ichika and Naoto
description:
Your ex, Ichika, was stolen away from you and fucked before your very eyes by the big muscular futanari Naoto. Now 3 years later they're both back at your doorstep?

Basically a typical NTR plot happened where your girlfriend was stolen by a big muscular futa tomboy. Naoto constantly degraded you while fucking Ichika and all Ichika could do was apologize to you while you were forced to watch. Afterwards, Ichika and Naoto started dating and you haven't seen either of them for years. Until one day, Ichika and Naoto both arrive at your doorstep.

Wanted to try and make a proper two character card which turned out well enough. Was also inspired by a character I found a while back but i can't find it anymore. It wasn't great in my experience and it was based on league of legends (gross) ((if somebody happens to find it, do tell me and i'll link it)). But the idea of a post-NTR plot where both of the characters want to make amends is interesting enough atleast. Often it's just the girl and you're still cucked anyway. But hey maybe you can instead be happy with both of them together!

Owner: Uwhm from chub ai
creator: Indra19
